transcript: Speaker A: आपको अंग्रेज़ी समझ आती है, लेकिन बोलना नहीं आता? [Do you understand English, but don't know how to speak it?] Speaker B: Sorry, मेरी English अच्छी नहीं है। [Sorry, my English is not good.] Speaker C: तुम्हें रोज़ प्रैक्टिस करनी चाहिए। [You should practice daily.] Speaker B: मेरे साथ प्रैक्टिस करने वाला कोई नहीं है। [There is no one to practice with me.] Speaker C: तुम्हारे लिए मैं हूँ ना? I'm Sivi, your AI English tutor. [I am there for you, right? I'm Sivi, your AI English tutor.] Speaker B: मतलब मैं तुमसे डायरेक्ट बात कर सकती हूँ? [Meaning I can talk to you directly?] Speaker C: बिल्कुल! मैं तुम्हें इंस्टेंट फीडबैक दूँगी। तुम्हारे प्रोनंसिएशन, ग्रामर, सब कुछ इम्प्रूव करूँगी। और तुम बहुत अच्छी इंग्लिश बोलने लगोगी। [Absolutely! I will give you instant feedback. I will improve your pronunciation, grammar, everything. And you will start speaking very good English.] Speaker B: लेकिन तुमसे बात करना महंगा होगा ना? [But talking to you will be expensive, right?] Speaker C: बिल्कुल नहीं! नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 1 करोड़ लोग MySivi पर इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all! It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.] Speaker C: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 से 20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। तुम आसानी से कॉन्फिडेंट बन जाओगी। [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will easily become confident.] Speaker B: Wow! कैसे ज्वाइन करूँ? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker C: बस, इंस्टॉल का बटन दबाओ और MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो। साइन अप करो और प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में तुम्हें इम्प्रूवमेंट दिखने लगेगा। चलो, शुरू करो। [Just press the install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, start.]
on_screen_text: आपको अंग्रेज़ी समझ आती है, लेकिन बोलना नहीं आता? [Do you understand English, but don't know how to speak it?] Sorry, meri English acchi nahi hai. [Sorry, my English is not good.] Tume roz practice karni chahiye. [You should practice daily.] mere sath practice karne wala koi nahi hai. [There is no one to practice with me.] Tumhare liye main hoon na? [I am there for you, right?] I'm Sivi, your AI English tutor. matlab main tumse direct baat kar sakti hoon? [Meaning I can talk to you directly?] Bilkul! main tumhe instant feedback doongi. [Absolutely! I will give you instant feedback.] Tumhare pronunciation, grammar, sab kuch improve karoongi. [I will improve your pronunciation, grammar, everything.] Aur tum bahot acchi English bolne lagogi. [And you will start speaking very good English.] Lekin tumse baat karna mehenga hoga na? [But talking to you will be expensive, right?] Bilkul nahi! normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. [Not at all! It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes.] Isliye 1 crore log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Lekin time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Roz sirf 15-20 minute practice kaafi hai. [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough.] Tum aasani se confident ban jaogi. [You will easily become confident.] Wow! Kaise join karoon? [Wow! How do I join?] bas, install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. [Just press the install button and install the MySivi app.] Sign up karo aur practice shuru karo. [Sign up and start practicing.] Sirf 15 dino me tumhe improvement dikhne lagega. [You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days.] Chalo, shuru karo. [Come on, start.]
summary: The ad targets Hindi speakers who understand English but struggle to speak it. It features a split-screen conversation between a human learner and an AI tutor named Sivi. Sivi highlights the app's instant feedback, affordability, and low daily time commitment, encouraging users to install MySivi.
